chapter_title.en: The Reward for Those Who Recite a Poem about Ĥusain (a.s.), Cry, and Make Others Cry

text: 6 وَ رُوِيَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ (ع) قَالَ لِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ ثَوَابٌ إِلَّا الدَّمْعَةَ فِينَا

en.sayyid-mohsen-al-husayni-al-milani: 6. It is narrated that: Abū ‘Abdillāh (Imam Sādiq (a.s.)) said, “There is a (known) reward for every act except for shedding tears over us.”
